name: Daily Tech News Briefing
description: Get a summary of top tech news delivered to you

agents.name: News Researcher
agents.purpose: Find top tech news stories from configured sources
agents.system_prompt_hint: Search for today's top tech news stories. Look at major tech news sources. Summarize headlines and key details.

agents.name: News Summarizer
agents.purpose: Summarize news stories into a concise briefing
agents.system_prompt_hint: Take the raw news data and create a well-formatted briefing with headlines, key points, and source links.

suggestion_card.title: Daily News Briefing
suggestion_card.subtitle: Get top stories summarized every morning
suggestion_card.prompt_template: Get me tech news every morning

author: agentfactory
